name: hanako-runtime-learner
description: Runtime self-learning engine for Hanako: observe local interaction patterns, learn repeated workflows and errors, inject conservative skill hints.
author: Sun

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check lib/common.js && node --check lib/helpers.js && node --check lib/hana-runtime-compat.js && node --check lib/official-utility-model.js && node --check lib/model-advisor.js && node --check lib/official-memory-bridge.js && node --check lib/pattern-detector.js && node --check lib/observer.js && node --check lib/proposals.js && node --check lib/session-turn.js && node --check lib/skill-lifecycle.js && node --check lib/scope.js && node --check lib/memory-index.js && node --check lib/memory-gate.js && node --check lib/evidence.js && node --check lib/temporal.js && node --check lib/facts.js && node --check lib/memfs.js && node --check lib/rank-fusion.js && node --check lib/embeddings.js && node --check lib/event-log.js && node --check lib/validation-gate.js && node --check lib/review-queue.js && node --check lib/tool-repair.js && node --check lib/policy-profiles.js && node --check lib/audit-bundle.js && node --check lib/usage-pipeline.js && node --check lib/pipeline.js && node --check tools/_shared.js && node --check tools/stats.js && node --check tools/report.js && node --check tools/control.js && node --check tools/activity.js && node --check tools/open-dir.js && node --check tools/search.js && node --check tools/doctor.js && node --check tools/normalize-config.js
scripts.test: node --test tests/common.test.js tests/proposals.test.js tests/config-validation.test.js tests/event-log.test.js tests/official-memory-bridge.test.js tests/pattern-detector.test.js tests/flush-turn.test.js tests/observer.test.js tests/runtime-e2e.test.js tests/model-advisor.test.js tests/usage.test.js tests/skill-lifecycle.test.js tests/config-consistency.test.js tests/scope-gate.test.js tests/retrieval-eval.test.js tests/doctor.test.js tests/evidence.test.js tests/temporal-facts.test.js tests/memfs.test.js tests/rank-fusion.test.js tests/semantic-search.test.js tests/review-governance.test.js tests/tool-repair.test.js tests/policy-audit.test.js tests/disk-sync.test.js
